name: E-6 recommended sets: --check-recommended-consistency rejects a rule with recommended: true that is missing from recommended_set
command:
mkdir -p tree && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - id: g-x-001
    recommended: true
recommended_set: []
all_set: [g-x-001]
' > tree/g.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-source-file.sh" --check-recommended-consistency tree/g.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'recommended_set inconsistent' err.txt && echo inconsistent_caught 1>&2
